subject: Biology
title: Pollination Partnerships
description: A fast breakdown of Pollination Partnerships for builders.

hook.text: About 75% of the world's flowering plants depend on animals to carry their pollen.

buildup.text: Bees are the most important pollinators, visiting thousands of flowers each day.

discovery.text: Some flowers evolved to match one specific pollinator. Darwin predicted a moth for a deep orchid.

twist.text: That moth was found decades later—with a 30-centimeter tongue that matched the orchid perfectly.

climax.text: Pollinator decline threatens food crops worldwide. One in three bites of food depends on them.

punchline.text: No pollinators, no food. It's that simple.

quiz.question: What fraction of your food depends on animal pollinators?
